notes: Fixture corpus for coc_country_match compound-normalizer PR-123.
Includes Class A deterministic-covered, Class B deterministic-missed/human-labeled, and Class C adversarial/out-of-scope cases.
Includes cross-family prompts combining coc_country_match with availability and vessel_tonnage across Classes A, B, and C while scoring coc_country_match only.
Provider prompt must preserve full CoC-country source spans and prefer contains_any for OR-style country phrasing.
